name: std-agent-assistant
description: Agent chat assistant: conversation, persistent memory, provider config (ChatGPT-style).

schema.name: std-agent-assistant
schema.description: Agent chat assistant: conversation, persistent memory, provider config (ChatGPT-style).

fields.name: messages
fields.description: A sequence of text representing a conversation.

fields.name: currentMessage
fields.description: The text of the most recent message in the conversation.

fields.name: response
fields.description: The text generated as an output.

fields.name: memoryCount
fields.description: The number of memory entries.

fields.name: contextUsage
fields.description: Represents the amount of context utilized.

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Specifies the external service or system used.

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: Unique identifier for a user's session.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current operational state of the component.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Details about any errors encountered during operation.

fields.name: turnCount
fields.description: The number of interactions in the conversation.
fields.synonyms: interaction count, round number, sequence number

fields.name: lastMessage
fields.description: The text of the most recent message.

fields.name: tokenCount
fields.description: The number of tokens used.

fields.name: role
fields.description: Specifies the function or identity within the interaction.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The text of the message or content being processed.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time when the event occurred.

fields.name: toolName
fields.description: Name of the tool utilized by the assistant.

emits.description: Fired when Assistant finishes loading
Fired when Assistant fails to load
Fired when Assistant finishes loading
Fired when Assistant fails to load

fields.name: content
fields.description: The text content of a message or data item.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Classification or type of the item.

fields.name: strength
fields.description: Numerical value representing a level or intensity.

fields.name: pinned
fields.description: Indicates whether the item is marked as important.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: Defines the area or subject of the conversation.

fields.name: lastAccessedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last access or usage.

emits.description: Fired when Memory finishes loading

fields.name: tokenCount
fields.description: The number of tokens used.

fields.name: maxTokens
fields.description: The maximum number of tokens allowed for a request.

fields.name: usage
fields.description: Represents the amount of resource consumed.

fields.name: lastCompactedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last compaction event.

fields.name: current
fields.description: The present value of a numerical measurement.

fields.name: max
fields.description: The maximum value allowed for a related quantity.

fields.name: threshold
fields.description: The minimum value required to trigger an action.

fields.name: message
fields.description: The text content of a message.

fields.name: notificationType
fields.description: Indicates the type of notification (info, success, warning, error).

fields.name: currentProvider
fields.description: The currently active provider for the assistant.

fields.name: currentModel
fields.description: The currently active model identifier.

fields.name: fallbackProvider
fields.description: Specifies an alternative provider to use when the primary fails.

fields.name: requestCount
fields.description: The number of requests made to the assistant.
